name: safeScroll
title: SafeScroll LX
description: Allows blurring or hiding of media and text from certain users or posts with certain tags

blogAvatars.name: Blur or hide avatars in filtered posts

media.name: Blur or hide media in filtered posts

text.name: Blur or hide text in filtered posts

shadowContent.name: Blur or hide sandboxed HTML posts
shadowContent.tooltip: Individual content elements within HTML posts cannot be filtered separately, due to how the HTML sandboxing functions.

root.name: Filter posts where the root user is a listed user

trail.name: Filter posts containing listed users in the staple trail

blogList.name: Filtered users
blogList.placeholder: Comma-separated list of users (username, not display name)

tagList.name: Filtered tags
tagList.placeholder: Comma-separated list of tags. Case-insensitive, partial matches are supported.

options.name: Hover to show content, click to dispel filter
